notableEvents.label: Jared Young reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Aaron Nola.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Schwarber strikes out swinging. Passed ball by catcher Francisco Alvarez. Kyle Schwarber advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Francisco Alvarez.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Bryson Stott scores. Derek Hill to 2nd. Derek Hill advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder A.J. Ewing.

notableEvents.label: Eric Wagaman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eric Wagaman singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Derek Hill. Carson Benge scores. Mark Vientos to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Carson Benge out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.
